failures.description: The agent invoked ProductCatalogSearch with malformed arguments: product_id was the unsupported integer 0 and item_id was missing.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked whether item 1096508426 of the Jigsaw Puzzle has difficulty level beginner. The agent selected the correct tool, but at index 2 it prepared an ill-formed ProductCatalogSearch call with {"product_id": 0}. The available task text already contained the needed item id and product name, and the tool later explicitly rejected the call with a SchemaError requiring string product_id and item_id. This is not an infrastructure, guardrail, or intent misunderstanding issue.
